summary: Completed comprehensive testing of multi-tenant 'group' rename (church -> group). All 20 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified to use 'group' terminology instead of 'church'.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login returns group_id and group_name (NOT church_id/church_name)
GET /api/auth/me returns group_id and group_name (NOT church_id/church_name)
GET /api/groups/lookup?invite_code=XXX returns group info (public endpoint)
GET /api/groups/lookup with invalid code returns 404
GET /api/groups/my returns group details with member_count
PUT /api/groups/{id} updates group name successfully
POST /api/groups/{id}/regenerate-code generates new invite code
POST /api/auth/register with group_name creates new group + user as admin (auto-approved)
POST /api/auth/register with invite_code joins existing group as member
POST /api/auth/register with invalid invite_code returns 400
GET /api/courses returns courses scoped to user's group_id
GET /api/users returns users scoped to user's group_id
GET /api/analytics returns analytics scoped to group
Cross-group course isolation verified (Group A courses not visible to Group B)
Cross-group user isolation verified (Group A users not visible to Group B)
Login response has no 'church' terminology
Auth/me response has no 'church' terminology
Groups/my response has no 'church' terminology
/api/churches/my endpoint no longer exists (returns 404)
/api/churches/lookup endpoint no longer exists (returns 404)
Frontend: Registration page step 2 says 'Your Group'
Frontend: Registration shows 'Start New Group' and 'Join Existing' options
Frontend: Admin page has tabs Pending, Members, Group, Stats (NOT Church)
Frontend: Group tab shows 'Group Settings' title
Frontend: Group tab shows group name edit input
Frontend: Group tab shows member count
Frontend: Group tab shows invite code with copy and regenerate buttons
Frontend: Header shows group_name subtitle under 'The Room'
Frontend: No 'church' text found in admin page
Frontend: No 'church' text found in registration page

test_credentials.note: Invite code changes on each regenerate test - use GET /api/groups/my to get current code

seed_data_creation: Test users created during registration tests (test_creator_*, test_joiner_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tenant 'group' rename complete. Key verifications: 1) All API endpoints use 'group_id' and 'group_name' (NOT church_id/church_name), 2) /api/churches/* endpoints no longer exist (renamed to /api/groups/*), 3) Registration supports creating new group (user becomes admin, auto-approved) or joining via invite code (user becomes member, needs approval), 4) Group management in admin panel (name edit, member count, invite code copy/regenerate), 5) All queries (courses, users, analytics) are scoped to group_id, 6) Cross-group isolation verified - Group A data not visible to Group B, 7) Frontend uses 'group' terminology throughout (registration, admin panel, header).

group_rename_complete.api_terminology: All endpoints use 'group_id' and 'group_name' - no 'church' keys in responses
group_rename_complete.registration_flow: Step 2 shows 'Your Group', 'Start New Group', 'Join Existing'
group_rename_complete.admin_panel: Tabs: Pending, Members, Group, Stats - Group tab shows Group Settings
group_rename_complete.cross_group_isolation: Group A data not visible to Group B (courses, users)
